vocab.meaning: khiến người khác phải nể trọng
vocab.example: In certain high-level business circles, a luxury timepiece is worn to command respect without saying a word.

vocab.meaning: sự khác biệt có thể nhận thấy rõ
vocab.example: To a connoisseur, there is a discernible difference in the sweeping movement of a high-end caliber compared to a mass-produced one.
Elite watches are often sought after for their unrivaled precision, guaranteed by rigorous chronometer testing.
For some, an expensive watch is merely an outward sign of their professional achievements and fiscal success.
The brand's heritage can vouch for the enduring quality of its most expensive models.
Luxury accessories like diamond-encrusted watches are often synonymous with an opulent lifestyle.

vocab.meaning: sự chú ý tỉ mỉ đến từng chi tiết
vocab.example: People pay a premium for the meticulous attention to detail found in hand-finished watch components.
Wearing a rare timepiece helps some individuals attain a sense of exclusivity and uniqueness.
Despite the formidable price tag, enthusiasts are willing to wait years on a list for a specific legendary model.
A classic gold watch can convey a message of stability and traditional values in conservative industries.
